samples:
I took a boat across the ocean
And I sail away, sailing home
On an open sea that is so deep
I'm falling into my dreams



And yet we all stand upon solid ground
Nowhere else to go and belong
We live in this world of ours, no other place
No one can tell us what to do
A thousand words at last are spoken
This vision is about to die
But now it comes alive when faced with reality
You will see you cannot face the truth
The end has come for good
Ashes to ashes ...


All along I have been dreaming
Of a different time and place
Some day on higher grounds I will find myself
And I'll overcome all obstacles
Until then I am going strong



It may take me hundreds of years
To discover who I am truly
Yet another step forward to reach the point
Where I will understand what happened
In this life there's nothing left to learn
For now, let me be where I want to be

All along you've been searching
For a way to escape, to survive
Now the dawn is coming near
There's a light in your heart


And when you have no ground beneath yourself
You cannot stay strong for long
The walls around are tumbling down
But now comes hope, yes, salvation
With power and might of soul
You will overcome all obstacles


See the sun rise from on high
Out there in the sky
Come back soon again


When we talk about love, we mean ourselves
We give our best so much care
To those who matter most
A thousand words cannot describe
This force of life
That makes us one with everyone else


In this world we live in
No one cares for life
No one wants to change
Wishes what we find destroyed


Behold the great awakening
Awake from your slumber, come
Restore the pride of being alive
Renew the vows that once were made
To protect the Earth and everything else
Now rise up against those who abuse
Power for their own advantage only

My mind's on the brink of something
Overcome by reality, I have to try my best
I want so bad to understand it all
And get my hands around this greatness


A thousand years from now, in a grove of ash
I will be transformed into ashes and ashes
From where I stand, I can see through the trees
The mountains high above the sea
So clear, I see their faces...
But they are made from stone and cannot talk
They always watch over me
No, I don't believe in them
In gods of power or wealth
The answer is somewhere else
In human nature lies the key
We must learn how to overcome
And take back what we lost along the way

This fire is burning deep inside of me
Nothingness seems like hell but I want to survive
There was no one to tell me how to live
Now I do everything my own way
On the ground, my feet are standing
Facing up the sky, I feel the wind blowing
Through the branches I hear the call of eagles
And I sense their presence on the rocks

I am not able to understand what is happening to me
This world has become a cage for me and I'm lost in the maze


All around, you will see this giant bird of prey
Rising on the wind to the skies
Flying through the air, flying at speed of light
Out there it goes leaving behind the dust
And all around, the great circle is so clear
It flies across vast ocean planes
The eagles are laughing in their nests up there
At the sight of this huge creature


I want to believe that I can fly
Soar high and away


Take off from where you are right now
Into the open sky
Now free yourself from chains of life
Open your mind and embrace the silence
Of space and time, no force upon you now
No gravity, no rules


Fly in the wild
You don't have to be told how to live anymore
Inexorable laws do not apply to you
On the wings of the wind
You fly

The night is deep and cold
My fear of the dark is killing me inside
All the lights I see are fading away
No one's there to save my life
I run so fast, but can't get out
Lost in this maze
But now you have come to rescue me
And set my fears aside


So long I want to cry for help
Don't let me die alone
Bring back my soul
Rescue me from down here
I fall into your hands
You hold the key of life


You don't even recognize yourself
Your feet are planted on solid ground
All around is just a black hole
The only way out being swallowed whole


We find ourselves falling, we crawl into light
Let us go to higher places
Overcome our suffering, release our soul
We meet up with our fate


Rescue me from down here
Rescue me from down here
Rescue me from down here
Rescue me from down here

This is the end

There is a door in my mind
That opens to the world
And I can see through it
Beyond this life and time


I don't remember when, where, or how
But there was always something inside me
Now it's awake
It cannot be contained
The end is near, the light is growing bright
I feel no fear, embrace the gift of life
My hands are open, eyes wide open
To all that's on the other side


Overcoming what seems impossible
This power from another place comes down to me now
We enter the door in our minds
Which leads us to the future


Feel no need to pray, hear no answer
All we want is to understand ourselves
From time ago
The silence has come now
The answers will reveal themselves one day
To all the questions you have asked yourself
Inexorable laws unfold to free your soul
Enter the door of your mind
You have entered now
Into the heart of the world

I'm standing here in the open
No one else is watching me
And I don't care what they say to me
Now, you can see it all through my eyes


Come now, all around
Feel like you belong
To this endless circle of life

You may call me a fool if you want
But I know myself and I want
My own way to be and stay
Out from your hands, out from your mind

The light grows pale when you're gone
And there you are, so clear you know
You will come back to us soon
When night is over and dawn comes in


From darkness to light
We were born on fire
With our backs against the wall
We are the pride and the hope of tomorrow
In the round great circle we will turn again
On the edge of time
We'll meet again
Beyond the veil
We go away, but do not forget where you have been

Come now, all around
Feel like you belong
To this endless circle of life

All the way from up there
I'm watching you
The time has come to face the facts
That you are on your own
You're all alone now, in the cold dark night
And I will be watching over you


If it hurts to hear my words
I feel for you
But I know how strong you are
To overcome this situation
This is just a test of life
On a journey through
The silence and the noise
This is just a game we play with ourselves
We lie awake when they tell us where to go
And then get up on our feet and fight until...

There's no need to fear what comes
This battle must be won
You have been put here to survive
Now the time has come to live
No one can deny this light
It lives inside you all along
For too long did you stay away
From yourself, the only shelter left


Every step that you take is leading you higher
Until you reach the sun
Leave behind all those illusions about things
Just see them rise again out of the dust

You'll see the light of tomorrow
And you will meet your master race
Don't fear to come out from under
The rocks that you have been hiding in


It feels like coming back home now
With this embrace, I feel so safe
But I can hear their laughter growing louder
When they call my name


I've always been there for you
Now is the time to go and get stronger
Face the pain and face the fear
Come out from under the rock where you hide


Your dream is alive
On this island, floating on the wind
All illusions are deadened
There is no place for hate or shame


If only dreams were true
Then you would see all over the world
One day we're gonna change the tide
Bring down these mountains made of stone
We will make new worlds arise
From our own hands and build a better future
The walls surrounding us fall away
We set ourselves free, open up
Unfold before our eyes

The world is changing
We have to change with it
But we don't want to move


This world is turning in a circle around the sun
And I watch all this change, my attention fixed on it
Now they're saying goodbye to what was once for good
Ashes to ashes and dust to dust we return now


Our life is based on science and reason
A step further than faith in truth can go
We'll meet again when our time has come
By the end of days when no one will remember
There are answers to all questions asked
When you die all ignorance crumbles away
You cannot even dream your whole life through
How could you not see that fire burns forever?

Now the planets have their orbits
Their axes of rotation set in place
They fly through space at lightning speed
Round round and round goes the great wheel of life

All things are subject to change
I am bound by gravity too
My feet stay rooted where I stand
On this ground I do belong
